name: finalproject
description: Monorepo: backend (Express API), frontend (Vite/React), database config

scripts.dev: node scripts/free-dev-ports.mjs && concurrently -n api,web,traffic -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend/contacts" "npm run dev --prefix frontend/traffic"
scripts.build:traffic: cd frontend/traffic && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend/contacts && npm install --prefix frontend/traffic
